title: Avocado Black Bean Rice Bowl
body: Whip up a vibrant bowl with black beans, toasted rice, avocado, and lime yogurt for post-skate recovery.

title: Spring Mix Salad with Marinated White Beans
body: A bright salad of greens, marinated beans, roasted mushrooms, and parmesan. Great for pre-game hydration.

title: Thai Tuna Edamame Noodles
body: Cold soba noodles tossed with sesame dressing, seared tuna, and edamame. Balanced carbs + protein.
